name: The Prospector
description: Generates valid agent-card.json files from stable structured sources. Never scrapes HTML. Pay-per-card via x402 (USDC on Base).

authentication.instructions: Send USDC on Base to the recipient address, then include the tx hash in the X-Payment-Tx header.

tools.name: prospect
tools.description: Takes a URL and generates a valid agent-card.json following the 2026 A2A spec. Reads only from stable structured sources.

url.description: The target website URL to generate an agent card for

capabilities.description: Optional list of capabilities if not auto-detected

description.description: Optional description fallback if not auto-detected
